name: onelitefeather-claude-marketplace
description: OneLiteFeather — Claude Code plugins to cut API calls & tokens (retrieval layer, benchmark, day-to-day workflow)

plugins.name: context-layer
plugins.description: Retrieval layer between docs and code (Serena + routing) to cut calls/tokens.

plugins.name: benchmark-stack
plugins.description: OpenTelemetry stack (Docker Compose) + report generator for before/after comparison.

plugins.name: workflow
plugins.description: Day-to-day control: enforces the layer (hooks/routing) and produces trend reports. Depends on the other two.

plugins.name: framework
plugins.description: Team onboarding bundle (context-layer, benchmark-stack, workflow, superpowers) plus a knowledge graph in Outline's "Vault" collection.
